name: livia
description: Livia — self-hosted, white-label AI Executive Assistant

scripts.check-env: node -e "const r=['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY','GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID','GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET','GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN','OWNER_EMAILS','OWNER_EMAIL','OWNER_NAME','LIVIA_EMAIL'];const m=r.filter(k=>!process.env[k]);if(m.length){console.error('Missing env vars:',m.join(', '));process.exit(1);}console.log('All required env vars present.');"
